editorial_notes: This recording is a 1940s-era industrial promotional film (likely Lincoln Electric or similar) shown in Tom Eagar's Summer 2013 Fusion Welding class. The transcript contains only the film soundtrack — narration and dramatized character dialogue — with no audio of Tom himself. Conventions designed for Tom's spontaneous speech do not apply. Speaker labels added for dramatized scenes. Captioner errors on welding terminology (arc/art, mold/mole, downhand) corrected silently. One garbled soldier line (p3) flagged with bracket. Recommend Richard reclassify in archive as 'screened material' rather than 'lecture' before layer 3 processing.

flags_for_editor.issue: Captioner garble on dramatized soldier dialogue 'Wold beer insist'; intended scripted line cannot be confidently recovered.
Source is not Tom's voice. Recommend reclassification of this video_id within the corpus before layer 3 sectioning is attempted.
